memo_surfaces.name: charter
memo_surfaces.summary: Role, mission, and hard rules of aoa-memo as the explicit memory and recall layer.
memo_surfaces.one_line_intent: Orient a reader to what aoa-memo is for and what it refuses to become.
memo_surfaces.use_when_short: Use when deciding whether work belongs in aoa-memo.
memo_surfaces.do_not_use_short: Avoid when the need is routing logic or proof doctrine.
memo_surfaces.inputs_short: Needs a question about role, ownership, or mission.
memo_surfaces.outputs_short: Produces mission-level orientation and rule-level constraints.
memo_surfaces.core_contract_short: Memory stays explicit, bounded, and distinct from proof and routing.
memo_surfaces.main_risk_short: Charter language gets stretched into permission for aoa-memo to swallow neighboring layers.
memo_surfaces.validation_short: Check that the proposed work still keeps memory distinct from proof and routing.
